Title: Encryption at rest
Requirement: All PII and financial identifiers encrypted at rest (Shield Platform Encryption for production)

Title: Authenticated integrations
Requirement: Integration calls authenticated (Named Credentials OAuth API keys for partners)

Title: Correlation ID
Requirement: Correlation ID on every application and integration log entry

Title: Idempotent event processing
Requirement: Duplicate platform events must not double-open accounts

Title: Application expiry
Requirement: 30 days inactivity leads to Rejected or expired reason code

Title: Language support
Requirement: English UI Wave 1-2; Welsh and localisation Wave 3+

Title: Availability
Requirement: 99.9% Salesforce; MuleSoft HA per enterprise standard

Title: Audit log retention
Requirement: CB_Integration_Log__c retains inbound/outbound payloads (retention policy TBD)

Title: Role-based access
Requirement: Role-based access via permission sets and permission set groups

Title: No direct vendor callouts
Requirement: No direct Salesforce to vendor callouts (all via MuleSoft)
